name: tpl-invoice-reconciliation
description: Invoice-to-Payment Reconciliation — OCR invoice, AI line-item matching against PO, auto-approve exact matches, escalate discrepancies, trigger payment. Replace OCR externalUrl with your provider (e.g. AWS Textract, Google Document AI). Replace payment externalUrl with your bank/ERP endpoint (e.g. SAP, NetSuite).

steps.notifyMsg: Invoice reconciliation requires AP manager review. Invoice: {{invoice_number}}, Vendor: {{vendor_name}}, PO: {{po_number}}. Match status: {{steps.match-po.output.match_status}}. Invoice total: {{steps.match-po.output.total_invoice_amount}}, PO total: {{steps.match-po.output.total_po_amount}}. Discrepancies: {{steps.match-po.output.discrepancies}}. Recommendation: {{steps.match-po.output.recommendation}}.

Payment processed for invoice {{invoice_number}} ({{vendor_name}}, PO: {{po_number}}). Amount: {{steps.match-po.output.total_invoice_amount}}. Transaction ref: {{steps.approve-payment.output.transaction_id}}. Status: {{steps.approve-payment.output.status}}.
